supply_chain.dependencies: AbbVie uses raw materials and components in its pharmaceutical and biologic manufacturing processes, including those sourced from single suppliers around the world. The failure of single-source suppliers to fulfill their contractual obligations could impair AbbVie's ability to deliver products to customers on a timely basis.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruption, single-source supplier dependencies, raw materials availability, manufacturing site physical disruptions, pandemics, natural disasters, regulatory noncompliance at supplier facilities, delays in construction or expansion of manufacturing facilities

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory approval delays or denials for new products and indications
Changes in healthcare policy and regulations in the United States and internationally
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 government price-setting for Medicare Part B and Part D drugs
Medicare Part D redesign and manufacturer discount requirements
Medicaid rebate requirements and state additional rebate demands
340B drug discount program requirements
European Union Medical Device Regulation (MDR) compliance
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act compliance
Anti-kickback and false claims laws
Physician Payments Sunshine Act reporting requirements
Data privacy laws in the European Union and United States
Environmental laws and regulations
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax implementation
Price controls and reimbursement restrictions in international markets
Compulsory licensing of patents by foreign governments
cGMP compliance requirements
Post-marketing surveillance and pharmacovigilance requirements
Product labeling and advertising restrictions
Clinical trial regulatory requirements
Import/export licensing requirements
Trade protection measures and tariffs

sanction_risks: Sovereign debt issues in certain non-U.S. countries
Political and economic instability in operating countries
War, political instability, and terrorist activities
Conflicts or crises in individual countries or regions
